news.title: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Forms OKX Venture And Launches GreenTrace Carbon Registry
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) has set up a 50-50 joint venture with OKX to build infrastructure for tokenized and digitally native financial products. The venture, co-chaired by former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, is expected to give clients access to tokenized versions of ICE futures and NYSE-listed equities. news.title: ICE Lags Industry, Trades at a Discount: Here's How to Play the Stock
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange expands across data services, mortgage technology and emerging market infrastructure to support long-term growth.

news.title: 1 Large-Cap Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Question
news.summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

news.title: ICE & OKX Are Getting Ready to Drink Coinbase’s Tokenized Milkshake
news.summary: A year after OKX’s guilty plea, which resulted in a $500 million fine, it has rebranded itself as the safe, NYSE-backed option for potentially 120 million traders.

news.title: CBOE Stock Plunges 28.4% in a Month: Time to Buy the Dip?
news.summary: Cboe Global leverages record derivatives activity, data services growth and portfolio optimization to fuel long-term expansion.

news.title: Nonstop Trading, Loads of Leverage. How ‘Perp Futures’ Are Shaking Up Wall Street.
news.summary: The CFTC’s approval of so-called perps has triggered a selloff in U.S. exchanges’ shares—and at least one high-profile lawsuit.

news.title: ICE Invests in OKX at $25 Billion to Launch Tokenized NYSE Stocks
news.summary: NYSE owner ICE partners with OKX in a major joint venture to bring tokenized NYSE equities and ICE futures to OKX’s 120 million users.

news.title: Cuomo to Lead Crypto Venture With New York Stock Exchange Owner
news.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo is starting a second act: Helping cryptocurrency exchange operator OKX and the owner of the New York Stock Exchange build a new business that merges digital and traditional finance markets.
